People: 1300: At 1, commenced firing a salute. At the 11th gun, No. 5 port side, by a premature discharge while loading, carried away the right hand of Michael Mclanas (Sea) and the left arm of James Wilson (Sea), both men fell overboard. Pasani (Sea) jumped overboard and supported them until a boat came alongside. Sent a boat to the English and Brazilian Flagship for medical officer and also to the USS Onward. Sent both men to the Hospital on shore in the 1st and 2nd cutters.
